basic_details.job_title: TMC ACTREC ICU/OT Technician Recruitment 2026 - Walkin
basic_details.organization_name: Advanced Centre for Treatment Research and Education in Cancer (TMC ACTREC)
basic_details.short_information: Advanced Centre for Treatment Research and Education in Cancer (TMC ACTREC) ICU/OT Technician Notification 2026 has been released on the official website of TMC ACTREC. Has been announced through the TMC ACTREC ICU/OT Technician Recruitment 2026. Candidates up to 33 years of age who have B.Sc. with 55% marks along with ICU/OT Technician/Respiratory Therapy qualification or relevant Paramedical degree with valid Maharashtra Paramedical Council Registration certificate are eligible to apply for these ICU/OT Technician vacancies. The walk-in interview for TMC ACTREC ICU/OT Technician Recruitment

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 33 years Age relaxation may be relaxed on the basis of working experience.

qualification.details: ICU/OT Technician: B.Sc. with 55% marks and one year certificate/diploma course in ICU/OT Technician/Respiratory therapy Technician. Bachelor degree in Paramedical Technology – OT Techniques / Bachelor degree in Respiratory Therapy / or Equivalent with minimum 55% marks in bachelor degree. B.Sc. with 55 % marks and one year work experience as ICU / OT Technician in a reputed Hospital is mandatory. Must have a valid Maharashtra Paramedical Council Registration certificate.

salary_details.details: Consolidated salary of Rs. 26,210/- p.m. to Rs. 35,000/- p.m.

faq.question: Q1. What is the post name for the TMC ACTREC recruitment?
faq.answer: The post name for the TMC ACTREC recruitment is ICU/OT Technician. This is a contract-based position.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the ICU/OT Technician role?
faq.answer: Candidates need a B.Sc. degree with 55% marks and a one-year certificate/diploma in ICU/OT Technician or Respiratory Therapy Technician, or an equivalent Bachelor's degree in Paramedical Technology.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the ICU/OT Technician position?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the ICU/OT Technician position is 33 years. Age relaxation may be provided based on working experience.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the ICU/OT Technician post?
faq.answer: The consolidated salary for the ICU/OT Technician post ranges from Rs. 26,210/- p.m. to Rs. 35,000/- p.m.

faq.question: Q5. How can candidates apply for the ICU/OT Technician position?
faq.answer: Candidates need to attend a walk-in interview. They must report to the specified venue with all required original documents and self-attested copies.

faq.question: Q6. What is the date and time for the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview is scheduled for 20th May 2026. The reporting time is between 01:00 p.m. and 01:30 p.m.

faq.question: Q7. Where is the walk-in interview venue?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview will be held at Room No-306, 3rd floor, Paymaster Shodhika, TMC- ACTREC, Sec-22, Kharghar, Navi Mumbai- 410210.

faq.question: Q8. What documents are required for the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: Candidates must carry their Bio-data, recent passport size photograph, scanned copies of Aadhar Card, PAN CARD, ORIGINAL and Self Attested copies of qualification mark sheets, certificates, and experience certificates.

faq.question: Q9. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification for this recruitment drive.
